caption:
Ⓜ️ Meta could become Anthropic’s biggest AI landlord

Meta and Anthropic are reportedly in talks over a massive $10 billion AI compute deal, according to Reuters.

If finalized, Meta would lease enormous amounts of AI computing power to Anthropic over the next two years, becoming one of the key infrastructure providers behind Claude.

The numbers are staggering:

💰 Up to $10 billion total
⚡️ Around $417 million every month for AI compute alone

It’s a surprising twist considering Meta is building its own AI models while potentially powering one of its biggest rivals at the same time.
